sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25521" key="diaphnhki/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαπηνηκίζω</orth> <sense id="n25521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λόγον</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trick out deceitfully,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:282" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">282</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (prob. l., cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πήνηξ</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
